title: Shatru
desc: An honest and brave police officer, Shubhankar Sanyal, decides to nab a notorious leader, Nishikanta Saha, and his associates for creating an environment of terror in Haridevpur.

title: Sakal Sandhya
desc: Joy, a thief, helps Anjali to become a singer and falls in love with her.

title: Moha Songhat
desc: A spiritual hermit faces temptation from a nymph and rivalry in a thin plotline.

title: Chaya Manush
desc: A devastated writer meets a man at his friend's place who is aware of the author's life.

title: Paglu 2
desc: Dev relocates to the city in order to finish his studies. Soon he falls in love with a girl in his college. Things go awry when she is kidnapped.

title: Ardhangini
desc: Shubhra and Meghna face emotional turmoil when Suman suffers an accident.

title: Zor
desc: Arjun, an honest cop, fails to fight corruption due to the obstacles created by his superiors and other influential people.

title: Jawker Dhan
desc: Two friends set out on a treasure hunt after solving a puzzle etched on a human skull.

title: Maya Mridanga
desc: The leader of an Alkap group goes into depression following the departure of a member.

title: Jamaibabu Zindabad
desc: This movie in all about ego clash between a woman hailing from a high-society family and a man with a lower middle class background.

title: Dwitiyo Purush
desc: An inspector tries to solve the murder cases that resemble the crimes from 25 years ago.

title: Power
desc: Jeetu wants to become a cop but is discouraged by his brother-in-law. A dejected Jeetu then steals his uniform and goes around policing in the town.

title: Fatafati
desc: Despite being ridiculed, a plus-sized tailor tries to become a fashion influencer.

title: Meher Aali
desc: Meher Ali's life changes when he gets convicted as a terrorist and imprisoned for life.

title: Generation Ami
desc: A 17-year-old boy experiences teenage angst and exhibits rebellious behaviour. He then meets a 19-year-old girl, who helps him be brave and leads him on a journey of self-discovery.

title: Borun Babur Bondhu
desc: Borun, a lonely old man, gains attention when he receives a letter from a famous friend, becoming the center of attention in family and neighborhood.

title: Pathbhola
desc: After killing a police officer, the lives of five unruly men take a drastic turn.

title: Zor
desc: An honest policeman faces an uphill battle against corruption in the police force.

title: Alinagarer Golokdhandha
desc: Soham, intrigued by Bengal's history, meets historian Ashutosh, who shares a puzzle from a friend leading to a rare artifact.

title: Khola Hawa
desc: Aditi falls for another man after her divorce, but her past comes back to haunt her.

title: Alinagarer Golokdhadha
desc: Soham and Ashutosh attempt to solve a riddle which leads to a rare artefact.

title: Bhootchakro Private Limited
desc: Three young friends declare themselves ghost hunters whilst searching for spirits. Things take a horrific turn when their lie turns into a truth.

title: Kishmish
desc: Two individuals fall in love, but their relationship faces many trials and tribulations.

title: Bidhataar Lekha
desc: Directed by Raja Mukherjee. With Jeet, Sabyasachi Chakrabarty, Roopa Ganguly, Ayan.

title: Dawshom Awbotaar
desc: Two cops race to stop a serial killer replicating Vishnu's 10 avatars in his murders.

title: Sangram
desc: An idealistic village schoolmaster protests against one man's efforts to win an election campaign that is taking place in the school he teaches at and gets murdered for it.

title: Cockpit
desc: Captain Dibyendu Rakshit must land an aircraft that has been damaged due to turbulence.

title: Kirtan
desc: Manimala dreams of a modern home for her son, but Avinash clings to their ancestral house. Daily, they face conflicts as Arup struggles to balance both sides.

title: Meghnadbodh Rohoshyo
desc: A famous writer Asimavo Bose disappears without a trace, leaving unanswered questions.

title: Happy New Year
desc: A group of friends reunite for a grand celebration, but secrets, betrayal and revenge emerge, turning their joyful night into a dramatic journey of love, loss and redemption.

title: Chaya Manush
desc: A devastated writer meets a man at his friend's place who is aware of the author's life.

title: Jibon Ek Utsab
desc: A grandson wishes to make the last few weeks for his dying grandfather, a time to remember. This gesture comforts him.

title: Cancer
desc: This is a story about a cancer patient's journey and the challenges they face in order to survive.

title: Oti Uttam
desc: The film follows a PhD scholar researching Uttam Kumar. After being rejected by the girl he loves, he teams up with the actor's grandson to bring the spirit of the legendary actor back.

title: Meher Aali
desc: Meher Ali, a Muslim boy who lives with his widowed mother, falls in love with a Hindu girl. His life turns upside down when he gets convicted as a terrorist and imprisoned for life.

title: Guru
desc: Best friends Raja and Iqbal, who hail from different religious backgrounds, help the local people. Their friendship is at stake when Raja's brother falls in love with Iqbal's fiancee.

title: Sentimentaal
desc: Suryaa Roy is transferred to Raghunathpur, where she faces the challenge of dealing with local politician Rudrani Chowdhury, who runs illegal businesses, creating a world of corruption and danger.
